data.body: PASS 1 (T1 — prior-art / novel-architecture justification): Substantially PASSES. The caching approach cites concrete OSS prior art (Arize/phoenix, code-graph-rag, shotgun, varro) and the named anthropic_cache_instructions/tool_definitions capability is the resolved mechanism. One coaching item: the AC "openai/gemini calls succeed unchanged" rests on the assertion that the cache mechanism is anthropic-gated/no-op for other providers — worth an explicit verification note in S1 to close the capability assertion fully.
